description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: Lawyers included on the Lawyer Registry for litigious categories, must have been Lead Counsel in at least 15 cases in the relevant area of law, type of process, and jurisdiction for which they are listed. Lawyers included on the Lawyer Registry for non-litigious matters must have demonstrable experience in the relevant area of law, type of process and jurisdiction indicated in the table set out under [A.2.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
